title: Check-In & Registration
description: Pick up your welcome package, tournament shirts, and player credentials. Meet and greet with fellow competitors.

title: Practice Round
description: Optional 18-hole practice round. Get familiar with the course layout and strategy. Tee times assigned upon check-in.

title: Welcome BBQ & Cocktails
description: Kick off the tournament with grilled favorites, craft beers, and tournament rules briefing. Dress code: casual.

title: Tournament Breakfast
location: Pebble Creek Golf Club - Dining Room
description: Continental breakfast buffet with hot items. Fuel up before Round 1!

title: Round 1 - Shotgun Start
description: First competitive round. Format: Individual Stroke Play. Carts provided. Scoring via mobile app.

title: Lunch on the Turn
description: Grab-and-go sandwiches, snacks, and beverages available at the turn.

title: Afternoon Social Hour
location: Pebble Creek Golf Club - 19th Hole Bar
description: Relax after Round 1. Putting contests, cigar lounge, and card games. Open bar.

title: Team Dinner & Entertainment
description: Prix fixe dinner with wine pairings. Live acoustic music. Round 1 highlights and side bet payouts.

title: Late Night Poker Tournament
description: $50 buy-in Texas Hold'em. Winner takes all. Optional side action.

title: Coffee & Light Breakfast
description: Quick breakfast with coffee, pastries, and fruit before the final round.

title: Round 2 - Championship Round
description: Final competitive round. Leaderboard groups. May the best dude win! Live scoring updates.

title: Lunch & Score Verification
location: Pebble Creek Golf Club - Dining Room
description: Post-round lunch buffet while scores are tallied and verified. Share war stories!

title: Awards Ceremony
location: Pebble Creek Golf Club - Grand Ballroom
description: Trophy presentation for Champion, Runner-Up, and special awards. Don't forget your camera!

title: Farewell Reception
location: Pebble Creek Golf Club - Sunset Deck
description: Champagne toast, hors d'oeuvres, and highlight reel screening. See you next year at The Dude Cup!

title: Departure
description: Safe travels home, dudes. Until next year!
